requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3, IMDG (Sea) and IATA Class 9 (Lithium Batteries to Nigeria)
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3、IMDG（海运）及IATA第9类（运至尼日利亚的锂电池）
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3、IMDG（海運）及IATA第9類（運至奈及利亞的鋰電池）

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, battery packs, and power banks) are classified as dangerous goods for transport. All lithium batteries, regardless of origin, must have a valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) before transport; UN 38.3 covers altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge. Most China-to-Nigeria battery cargo moves by sea to Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne, governed by the IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — lithium-ion cells are UN 3480, batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481, classified as Class 9 with applicable packing instructions, marking, and a dangerous-goods declaration. Where shipped by air, the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and ICAO Technical Instructions apply, including the 30% state-of-charge limit for loose lithium-ion cells as cargo. The transport documentation (declaration, marks, labels) is required for the carrier and for SONCAP/customs handling; UN 38.3 is also commonly requested as part of the SONCAP conformity dossier.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组及移动电源）在运输上被归类为危险货物。所有锂电池无论产地，运输前须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）；UN 38.3涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。多数中国至尼日利亚的电池货物经海运至拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne，受IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）约束——锂离子电芯为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备中的电池为UN 3481，归为第9类，适用相应包装说明、标识及危险货物申报。经空运时适用IATA危险品规则及ICAO技术细则，包括散装锂离子电芯作为货物时30%荷电状态限制。运输文件（申报、标记、标签）为承运人及SONCAP/海关处理所需；UN 38.3也常作为SONCAP合格评定卷宗的一部分被要求。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組及行動電源）在運輸上被歸類為危險貨物。所有鋰電池無論產地，運輸前須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險品運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）；UN 38.3涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。多數中國至奈及利亞的電池貨物經海運至拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne，受IMDG規則（國際海運危險品規則）約束——鋰離子電芯為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備中的電池為UN 3481，歸為第9類，適用相應包裝說明、標識及危險品申報。經空運時適用IATA危險品規則及ICAO技術細則，包括散裝鋰離子電芯作為貨物時30%荷電狀態限制。運輸文件（申報、標記、標籤）為承運人及SONCAP/海關處理所需；UN 38.3也常作為SONCAP合格評定卷宗的一部分被要求。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code), current edition — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 (sea transport to Nigerian ports)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481) for air transport
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air (Doc 9284)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements, and applies the IMDG Code for sea exports leaving Chinese ports. For domestic road transport, GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617 (Road Transport of Dangerous Goods) apply. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries by sea or air therefore already typically obtain UN 38.3 reports and prepare IMDG/IATA dangerous-goods documentation. These are international transport instruments shared with Nigeria — the carrier-side transport requirements (UN 38.3, IMDG/IATA classification, marks and declaration) are essentially the same on both ends.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求，离开中国港口的海运出口适用IMDG规则。国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危险货物运输）。因此经海运或空运出口锂电池的中国出口商通常已取得UN 38.3报告并准备IMDG/IATA危险货物文件。这些是与尼日利亚共用的国际运输文书——承运人侧运输要求（UN 38.3、IMDG/IATA分类、标记及申报）在两端基本相同。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求，離開中國港口的海運出口適用IMDG規則。國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危險品運輸）。因此經海運或空運出口鋰電池的中國出口商通常已取得UN 38.3報告並準備IMDG/IATA危險品文件。這些是與奈及利亞共用的國際運輸文書——承運人側運輸要求（UN 38.3、IMDG/IATA分類、標記及申報）在兩端基本相同。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 test reports and IMDG/IATA Class 9 documentation are required internationally and most Chinese exporters already hold them, so the carrier-side transport gap to Nigeria is small. The Nigeria-specific points are: (1) UN 38.3 is frequently requested within the SONCAP conformity dossier, so the report must cover the exact cell/pack configuration being certified and shipped; (2) most volume moves by sea under the IMDG Code into Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne — packing, marking, and the dangerous-goods declaration must be correct for the receiving terminal, and any Nigerian port/terminal dangerous-goods handling fees and procedures apply; (3) for air shipments, IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% maximum for loose lithium-ion cells as cargo) apply. Exporters should confirm UN 38.3 reports are from an accredited laboratory and align with the SONCAP product registration.
gap.zh: UN 38.3测试报告及IMDG/IATA第9类文件为国际性要求，大多数中国出口商已持有，因此运至尼日利亚的承运人侧运输差距较小。尼日利亚特有要点：（1）UN 38.3常在SONCAP合格评定卷宗内被要求，故报告须涵盖被认证和出货的确切电芯/电池组配置；（2）多数货量经IMDG规则海运至拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne——包装、标识及危险货物申报须符合接收码头要求，并适用尼日利亚港口/码头危险货物处理费用及程序；（3）空运适用IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯作为货物时最高30%）。出口商应确认UN 38.3报告来自认可实验室，并与SONCAP产品注册一致。
gap.zht: UN 38.3測試報告及IMDG/IATA第9類文件為國際性要求，大多數中國出口商已持有，因此運至奈及利亞的承運人側運輸差距較小。奈及利亞特有要點：（1）UN 38.3常在SONCAP合格評定卷宗內被要求，故報告須涵蓋被認證和出貨的確切電芯/電池組配置；（2）多數貨量經IMDG規則海運至拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne——包裝、標識及危險品申報須符合接收碼頭要求，並適用奈及利亞港口/碼頭危險品處理費用及程序；（3）空運適用IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯作為貨物時最高30%）。出口商應確認UN 38.3報告來自認可實驗室，並與SONCAP產品登記一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all modes; IMDG Code Class 9 compliance mandatory for sea transport to Nigerian ports; IATA DGR state-of-charge limits mandatory for air cargo; UN 38.3 is also commonly required within the SONCAP dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport; IMDG Code for sea export

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing and IMDG/IATA Class 9 documentation are universal transport requirements — Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries to Nigeria must hold valid UN 38.3 reports from accredited laboratories and correct dangerous-goods documentation. Most volume moves by sea under the IMDG Code into Lagos or Onne. The Nigeria-specific consideration is that UN 38.3 is frequently part of the SONCAP conformity dossier and must match the certified/shipped configuration; the carrier-side transport requirements largely mirror what compliant Chinese exporters already satisfy.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试及IMDG/IATA第9类文件为全球性运输要求——向尼日利亚出口锂电池的中国出口商须持有经认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3报告及正确的危险货物文件。多数货量经IMDG规则海运至拉各斯或Onne。尼日利亚特有考量是UN 38.3常作为SONCAP合格评定卷宗的一部分，须与被认证/出货的配置一致；承运人侧运输要求与合规中国出口商已满足的内容大体一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試及IMDG/IATA第9類文件為全球性運輸要求——向奈及利亞出口鋰電池的中國出口商須持有經認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3報告及正確的危險品文件。多數貨量經IMDG規則海運至拉各斯或Onne。奈及利亞特有考量是UN 38.3常作為SONCAP合格評定卷宗的一部分，須與被認證/出貨的配置一致；承運人側運輸要求與合規中國出口商已滿足的內容大體一致。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)
